scripts.build: node ../scripts/checkViteEnv.mjs frontend-admin production && tsc --noEmit && vite build
scripts.build:staging: node ../scripts/checkViteEnv.mjs frontend-admin staging && tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode staging
scripts.build:test: node ../scripts/checkViteEnv.mjs frontend-admin test && tsc --noEmit && vite build --mode test
